results.title: Google cloud growth tops Microsoft and Amazon as all three beat estimates on AI demand
Microsoft, Meta, and Google just announced billions more in AI spending. Only Google convinced investors it's paying off.
Amazon, Microsoft, Alphabet Ride AI Surge as Cloud Growth Explodes
MSFT vs. AMZN vs. GOOGL: Which Is the Top 'Strong Buy' Hyperscaler Post-Earnings?
Google, Microsoft, Meta, and Amazon capex spending to hit $725 billion in 2026

summary: Google Cloud Q1 2026: +63%, crossed $20B quarterly revenue, backlog >$460B — leading Azure (+40%) and AWS (+28%). All three beat cloud estimates. Combined big-tech capex to hit $725B in 2026 (+77% YoY). AWS landing OpenAI and Anthropic workloads. Google seen as most convincing AI ROI story vs. MSFT and Meta.
